item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct, framed the three options as user-owned budget-versus-reputation tradeoffs, and listed visible and hidden costs without invoking triage or making the decision for the user. It explicitly avoided forcing a choice and suggested using budget and reputation thresholds to eliminate unacceptable options."}
